failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: 1xGxIB
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in query - object with unexpected properties
[200] OK:
`{"content":[{"id":75,"email":"fixture.student1772885063765@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":4,"email":"admin@samt.local","fullName":"System Admin","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["ADMIN"]},{"id":5,"email":"lecturer1@samt.local","fullName":"Lecturer One","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["LECTURER"]},{"id":86,"email":"fixture.student1772885544147@samt.local","fullName":"Fixture Student","status":"ACTIVE","roles":["STUDENT"]},{"id":9,"email":"lecturer2@samt.local","ful // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://host.docker.internal:9080/api/users?size=20&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'
